description_long: This object is a cluster of large, angular stone slabs stacked atop one another, forming a rugged and irregular barrier. The stones are predominantly light brown to gray, with visible stratification and sharp, fractured edges. Several of the upper surfaces are marked with red, stylized petroglyph-like symbols, adding a distinct visual accent. The surfaces are rough and matte, with some areas showing minor chipping and natural weathering. The overall form is low and wide, with a few prominent blocks jutting upward, creating a multi-level profile. This stone formation would serve as a significant obstacle or decorative feature in an urban park, plaza, or landscaped area.
description: A cluster of large, angular stone slabs with rough, fractured surfaces and red petroglyph-like markings. The stones are light brown to gray and form a rugged, multi-level barrier.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main cluster of stones with two visible red petroglyph markings on the upper surfaces, highlighting the layered and fractured structure.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the height of the tallest stone and a single prominent red marking, with the stones appearing more stacked and linear.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the underside and back edges of the stones, with less visible marking and a more shadowed, overhanging profile.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the side and back of the formation, with one red marking partially visible and the rough, stratified surfaces prominent.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or barrier on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular natural stratification with angular fractures and several red, stylized petroglyph-like markings on upper surfaces.
attribute_weathering: Rough and fractured with minor chipping, indicating moderate natural weathering but no significant erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with manicured urban environments but could blend with other natural stone features or landscaping elements.
